pipeline_status.poller: PRED-105 silent-ignore 10 consecutive polls (6.66 days); 3 consecutive daily_review auto-regens (Apr 22/23/24) all identical 69/10/4 — pipeline-canonical. 7-day manual-commit drought crossed. predictions.html byte-identical 9 polls. PRED-072 still soft-pending.
pipeline_status.analyst: EXP-244 (Chapman cluster canonicalization) and EXP-245 (WIN-067 SAA citation split) both completed and self-applied. 5 issue-resolution proposals processed for ISS-1287/1308/1441/1491/1492 bundle.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 3 pending reviews processed (WIN-068 c14, WIN-025 c6, WIN-067 c10). WIN-068 c14 was major-severity; EXP-244 resolves its primary cluster-inconsistency hole. Queue depth: 3 (WIN-010/025/068 freshly rewritten, awaiting c15/c7/c7 reviews).

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No new WINs. PRED-105 still PENDING at 6.66 days post-window. V51.1 model version stable. All parameter anchors match baseline. 69 confirmed WINs, 4 refined, unchanged.

internal_issues.description: EXP-244 applied: Chapman cluster-wide citation canonicalization. Chapman 1933 (lunar tidal paper) replaced with Chapman 1919 (founding Sq-framework paper, Phil. Trans. R. Soc. A 218:1–118) across all three WINs. Yamazaki & Maute 2021 DOI 10.3389/fspas.2021.766327 corrected (was Meza et al. 2021 Patagonian Eclipse) to Y&M 2017 Space Science Reviews 206:299–405. Kim & Chang pages 2040–2054 corrected to 2040–2049 (ADS-confirmed). Rastogi 1962 dropped (unverifiable as eclipse-specific). WIN-025 age arithmetic updated 93→107 years.

EXP-245 applied: WIN-067 SAA citation split. Pappa 2019 now scoped to Antarctic gravity anomaly only. Finlay et al. 2020 (CHAOS-7) and Tarduno et al. 2015 (LLSVP) added for SAA core-dynamo mechanism. Expected defense_survives: 4→2. Resolves c10 H1 (advocate-survives-4).
NEW from c14: tldr_verdict phrasing 'since Chapman (1919)' slightly awkward (attributive vs temporal ambiguity). Simple rewrite candidate.
NEW from c14: verdict_history two-flip (Std→Self-Contradicted→Std) lacks narrative note explaining the sequence.

NEW from c6: FAIL-007 outcome field alignment. The dome's stated Kp ~5-6 rationale for removing WIN-025 is contradicted by GFZ data (Kp ≤ 2 per WIN-025 current evidence). FAIL-007 entry should more prominently attribute the Kp ~5-6 claim to the dome author and note it is refuted.
NEW from c10: (1) 4.8× Domain-4 figure stated without range; (2) monitoring tag 'none' while detail_evidence cites formula with λg=8619; (3) V51.0 vs V51.2 version mixing. All minor; batch-patchable.

expansions_integrated.target: WIN-067 SAA citation split (defense neutralization H1)
expansions_integrated.queued_for_curmudgeon: WIN-067 (already in queue, popped by existing review)

curmudgeon_queue.schedule_action_needed: restore_to_bau — mode is BAU but curmudgeon interval is 30min (fast). Human should restore curmudgeon schedule to 240min.

recommended_actions.action: Restore curmudgeon schedule to BAU (240min interval). Mode is 'bau' but schedule is still running at 30min fast-mode. No human toggle needed in priority-queue.json — just update the scheduled task interval.
ISS-1514: Update FAIL-007 in uncounted-failures.json to clearly attribute Kp ~5-6 claim to dome author and note GFZ refutation. Moderate severity, direct patch to data/uncounted-failures.json.

ISS-1508 (still open): WIN-025 tldr_verdict references '2017 observation' without self-containing context. Minor; EXP-244 did not touch tldr_verdict beyond the Chapman/age-arithmetic fix — '2017 observation' text remains. Patchable in-line.
